jsCode: (function() { function scrape() { try { const data = {}; const rows = document.querySelectorAll('.content-cover'); rows.forEach(row => { const titleEl = row.querySelector('h3'); const valueEl = row.querySelector('span.bgm:not([style*="display: none"])'); if (titleEl && valueEl) { const key = titleEl.textContent.trim().toLowerCase().replace(/\s+/g, '_'); const value = valueEl.textContent.trim(); data[key] = value; } }); if (Object.keys(data).length > 0) { window.ReactNativeWebView.postMessage(JSON.stringify(data)); } } catch (e) {} } scrape(); setInterval(scrape, 3000); })(); true;
